Figure 2: Overview of the MATO framework, which consists of three key components: (1) reward discovery, which recovers preference rewards from the backbone LLM, (2) weight optimization, which dynamically adjusts objective weights to balance preferences during generation, and (3) online optimization, which guides the output distribution using the learned rewards and weights.
